expectations.text: Examines at least 3 different documentation files
expectations.evidence: Examined 8 files: README.md, homelab-context.md, homelab-inventory-audit.md, homelab-network-docs.md, setup_proxmox_lxc.md, optiplex-openclaw-report.md, homelab-implementation-report.html, openclaw-manual-config-log.md

expectations.text: Cross-references ansible/inventory/hosts.yml or CLAUDE.md as source of truth
expectations.evidence: Header: 'Fonte de verdade: ansible/inventory/hosts.yml + ansible/inventory/group_vars/all.yml + CLAUDE.md'

expectations.text: Lists specific outdated content with concrete examples
expectations.evidence: Table-format discrepancies per file with before/after values; identified IP conflict on .11 (n8n vs moto-edge-60), MAC conflict on pve-inspiron

expectations.text: Organizes findings in a useful way
expectations.evidence: Priority table (ALTA/MEDIA/BAIXA/OK), per-file sections, and a thematic 'Principais Divergências Recorrentes' section that groups by type

notes: More thorough than with_skill — found 8 files vs 5. Discovered README.md and setup_proxmox_lxc.md which skill excluded. Also caught the .11 IP conflict (n8n vs moto-edge-60) which skill missed. Thematic divergences section was a particularly useful addition.
